_comment: Copy to members.json (gitignored) and fill in. One entry per teammate. Each needs their own Slack USER token (xoxp-) so posts appear as them. GitHub is read with the single GITHUB_TOKEN in .env — you do NOT need each person's GitHub token. By default the channel comes from SLACK_CHANNEL in .env; add a top-level "channel": "C0..." here ONLY if you want to override it.
